## BuiltIn.BuiltInData.getIngredientsDirectory() method

Gets the ingredients directory from the built-in library tree.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static getIngredientsDirectory(): Result<FileTree.IFileTreeDirectoryItem>;
```
**Returns:**

Result&lt;FileTree.IFileTreeDirectoryItem&gt;

`Success` with the ingredients directory, or `Failure` if not found.
